author: Alex S
subject: v2.8.1
body: ## [2.8.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.8.0...v2.8.1) (2018-07-03) ### Bug Fixes * **connectHitsPerPage:** default value should not break the API ([#3006](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3006)) ([6635304](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/6635304)), closes [#2732](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2732) * **connectRefinementList:** throw error with usage ([#2962](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2962)) ([f60222d](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f60222d)) * **sourcemap:** provide good url ([#3011](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3011)) ([9632ade](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/9632ade)) * **warning:** make sure suggested import is possible ([#3014](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3014)) ([eb27152](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/eb27152))
